candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; matches Total Revenue numerically and is more specific than the duplicated total.
Valid top-line revenue total; appears to duplicate Operating revenue and can serve as fallback if label changes over time.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue recognized on the income statement.

variables.notes: Using income-statement revenue labels as priority list; later code should take first non-missing value, not sum them.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs on the income statement.
Balance sheet asset, not period cost of goods sold.
Balance sheet inventory category, not an income statement expense.
Balance sheet inventory category, not COGS expense.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost line from the income statement.

candidates.why: Valid overhead component, but not sufficient alone because payroll/admin overhead is also separately disclosed.
Broad total operating expenses that includes COGS and D&A, so it should not be used when component rows exist.
Possible R&D line, but it appears only in supplemental disclosure and is not the main overhead bucket to use for SG&A here.

variables.notes: CR:c|high|double. R:c. Candidate list misses key overhead component rows present in column A. Chose outside candidates because 'Operating expenses' is a total that clearly includes COGS and D&A, while 'Payroll expenses', 'Share Based Payment', and 'Other operating expenses' are the best SG&A-style components. Manual review recommended to confirm whether payroll is fully overhead versus partly production-related. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Payroll expenses, [Income Statement] Share Based Payment

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D label exists; although preview values are empty and it appears in supplemental disclosure below the main operating section, it is still the best semantic match for XRD.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: R&D-related wording, but this is amortization within R&D, not total R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset line, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Mapped to the dedicated R&D line. Not added to XSGA_COMPONENTS because it appears only in supplemental disclosure below EBIT and should not be assumed embedded in the selected SG&A components.

candidates.why: Core recurring interest expense line; preferred granular component.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost component and should be included with interest expense.
Broader total includes non-interest finance items; avoid when granular components are available.
Could contain recurring finance costs, but may include non-interest items; excluded to avoid ambiguity.
Good conceptually, but preview is empty and granular interest rows are available.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest cost components and avoided broader totals/net finance rows to prevent double counting and inclusion of FX/other non-interest items.

candidates.why: Best equity line because it excludes the separately disclosed non-controlling interest; this avoids double counting with MIB.
Includes minority interest because it equals Total equity plus Non-controlling interest; should not be used when MIB is mapped separately.
Only a component of equity, not total book equity.

variables.notes: Selected the parent/common equity line that excludes non-controlling interest.

candidates.why: Standard balance sheet NCI line; best match for minority interest.
Equivalent NCI label and valid fallback if label changes over time.
Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Using balance-sheet minority equity labels as priority list; later code should take first non-missing value, not sum them.
